summary: Completed testing of HevaPOS P0-P2 features. 15/18 backend tests PASSED. All frontend UI tests PASSED. Key features verified: Staff Management UI (3 tabs), Login for all 3 user types, Stripe Billing button, Printer Discovery dialog, Back buttons on Orders/Reports, PDF Download button. Found 3 backend bugs and 2 frontend issues.

critical.issue: 500 Internal Server Error - KeyError: 'total_amount'. Some orders in DB don't have total_amount field, causing PDF generation to fail.
critical.fix: Use order.get('total_amount', 0) instead of order['total_amount'] on line 998 of server.py

minor.issue: 422 Validation Error - password field is required for update. Uses StaffCreate model which requires password, but update should allow optional password.
minor.fix: Create StaffUpdate model with Optional[str] password field

minor.issue: Response format inconsistent - returns {message, id} instead of full user object. Frontend expects username in response.
minor.fix: Return full user object or update frontend to use id from response

issues: Monthly Revenue card shows hardcoded '$' instead of using restaurant currency from DB. Should use dynamic currency symbol.
Total MRR card shows hardcoded '$' instead of using restaurant currency from DB. Should use dynamic currency symbol.

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: server.py line 998 - use order.get('total_amount', 0) to handle missing field
FIX: Create StaffUpdate model with optional password for PUT /api/restaurant/staff/{user_id}
FIX: PlatformDashboard.js line 127 - replace hardcoded $ with dynamic currency
FIX: PlatformReports.js line 106 - replace hardcoded $ with dynamic currency
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 998: KeyError risk - order['total_amount'] should use .get() with default
server.py line 2474: update_staff uses StaffCreate model requiring password - should use separate StaffUpdate model
PlatformDashboard.js/PlatformReports.js: Hardcoded $ currency symbols remain despite requirement to use DB currency
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 user types login correctly. Staff Management UI works with 3 tabs (Business Info, Staff Management, Change Password). Staff CRUD works except update requires password. Stripe Billing button visible on /platform/subscriptions. Printer Discovery dialog has WiFi/Bluetooth scan options. Back buttons present on Orders and Reports pages. PDF Download button present but backend fails with 500 error. Platform Dashboard mobile has no horizontal overflow.

frontend_tests.settings_tabs: PASSED - Business Info, Staff Management, Change Password tabs visible
frontend_tests.staff_management_ui: PASSED - Add Staff button, staff list, edit/delete/reset-password buttons
frontend_tests.add_staff_dialog: PASSED - username, password, role fields present
frontend_tests.change_password_form: PASSED - current, new, confirm password fields present
frontend_tests.discover_printers_dialog: PASSED - WiFi and Bluetooth scan buttons present
